get.summary: Get a list of documents that meet the criteria you specify.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search for documents that contain the given string in the name. Search is not case-sensitive.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Type of documents to search: `0: My Documents | 1: Created | 2: Shared | 3: Trash | 4: Public | 5: Recent | 6: By Owner | 7: By Company | 9: By Team`

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Owner ID. Can be a user ID, company ID, or team ID, depending on `ownerType`.

parameters.name: ownerType
parameters.description: Type of owner. `0: User | 1: Company | 2: Onshape`. If the owner is a teamId, leave this unspecified.

parameters.name: sortColumn
parameters.description: Column by which to sort search results. `name | modifiedAt | createdAt (default) | email | modifiedBy | promotedAt`

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: Sort order. `desc` (descending, default), or `asc` (ascending).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: Parent Id

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset. Determines where search results begin. Default value is 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page. Default value is 20 (also the maximum). Number of results returned can be less than this value. Use the `next` URL in the response to fetch the next page.

post.description: The `name` field is required in the `BTDocumentParams` schema when creating a new document.

get.summary: Download external data file(s) associated with the document.
get.description:
* See [API Guide: Model Translation](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/translation/) for more details.
* If downloading an exported file, poll the `requestState` in the translation response and wait for a result of `DONE` before attempting to download the file. 
* Use the `resultExternalDataIds` from the translation response as the foreign id (`{fid}`) in this API.

get.summary: Retrieve version by document ID and version ID.

post.summary: Update external references to latest by document ID, workspace ID, and tab ID.
Move tab by document ID and workspace ID.

delete.summary: Delete workspace by document ID and workspace ID.

get.summary: Retrieve document history by document ID and workspace or microversion ID.
Retrieve tabs and folders by document ID and workspace or version or microversion ID.
get.description: Returns information on tabs and folders in the document.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wvm
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w), version (v), or document microversion (m) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvmid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version or document microversion in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: elementType
parameters.description: If specified, information for elements of this type are returned. Note, the folder structure is not affected by this filter.

parameters.name: elementId
parameters.description: If specified, only the element with this id is returned. Note, the folder structure is not affected by this filter.

parameters.name: withZipContents
parameters.description: When true, returns the names of the files inside each zip file tab. Ignored if the document contains more than 10 zip files.

get.summary: Retrieve tabs by document ID and workspace or version or microversion ID.
get.description: This endpoint only returns the tabs and not folders in the document. Use the [getDocumentContents](#/Document/getDocumentContents) endpoint to get information about folders and tabs.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wvm
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w), version (v), or document microversion (m) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvmid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version or document microversion in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: withZipContents
parameters.description: When true, returns the names of the files inside each zip file tab. Ignored if the document contains more than 10 zip files.

get.summary: Get the selected units and precision by document ID and workspace or version or microversion ID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wvm
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w), version (v), or document microversion (m) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvmid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version or document microversion in which the operation should be performed.

get.summary: Retrieve current microversion by document ID and workspace or version ID.

post.summary: Export document by document ID, workspace or version ID, and tab ID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wv
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w) or version (v) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

get.summary: Retrieve insertables by document ID and workspace or version ID.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: Id of document that links to the document being accessed. This may provide additional access rights to the document. Allowed only with version (v) path parameter.

post.description: This returns list of documents based on search parameters.

post.summary: Update document attributes by document ID.

get.summary: Retrieve access control list by document ID.

post.summary: Allow or deny anonymous access to a document or publication.
post.description: If anonymous access is allowed, you can allow or deny anonymous users the ability to export the document or publication. If `anonymousAccessAllowed=false` and `anonymousAllowsExport=true`, the call will throw an error.

post.summary: Make a document public or private.
post.description:
* Set `public=true` in the request body to make the document public. Set to `false` to make it private. Free users cannot make documents private. 
 * The `documentId` provided in the URL must match the one provided in the request body exactly.

get.summary: Retrieve Document permissions by document ID.

delete.summary: Remove document View permissions from a user or other entity.
delete.description: Specify the ID of the entity to unshare with in the `eid` field, and specify the type of entity being identified in the `entryType` field. For example, to unshare a document with a company, you would use `1` as the `entryType` value and the `companyId` as the `entityId`.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: ID of the document to unshare.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: ID of the entity to remove permissions for. Uses `userId`, `companyId`, `teamId`, `documentId`, or `applicationId`, depending on the `entryType` value.

parameters.name: entryType
parameters.description: `0` (user) | `1` (company) | `2` (team) | `3` (document) | `4` (application) | `5` (connection_user)

post.summary: Share document by document ID with Onshape support.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: Document ID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: Document ID.

get.summary: Merge preview of changes that will occur based on document ID, workspace ID and source workspace/version ID

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

post.summary: Restore version or microversion to workspace by document ID, workspace ID, and version or microversion ID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

post.summary: Copy workspace by document ID and workspace ID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: ID of the document to copy.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: ID of the workspace to copy.

post.summary: Merge into workspace by document ID and workspace ID.

items.description: Document Items array. Array entries are the same as that returned from "/api/documents/{did}".

next.description: The URL for the next page of items. Responses are limited to 20 items per page.

previous.description: The URL for the previous page of items. Responses are limited to 20 items per page.

elements.description: List of element IDs to include in the document.

forceExportRules.description: `true` if the current user can toggle the Force Export Rule flag on a document.

isEmptyContent.description: Set to `true` to generate an empty document.

isPublic.description: Set to `true` to make the document public.

notRevisionManaged.description: Set to `true` to indicate that revisions are not managed for this document.

ownerId.description: If `ownerType=USER`, this is the user ID. If `ownerType=COMPANY`, this is the company ID.

parentId.description: Document ID of this document's parent.

projectId.description: ID of the project this document belongs to.

tags.description: Array of strings to set as tags for the document.

items.description: Array of strings to set as tags for the document.

BTDocumentParams.description: Parameters for creating and updating documents.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

sourceVersionName.description: Name of version to move elements from (source).

targetVersionName.description: Name of version to move elements to (target).

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

restoreId.description: If this microversion is the result of a restore from another microversion, the restoreId will be the microversion Id of the original microversion that was restored. Otherwise this id will not be included within the response.

elements.description: The elements (tabs) in the document. This does not include folders.

additionalProperties.description: Specifies the display precision for every supported unit.

unitsDisplayPrecision.description: Specifies the display precision for every supported unit.

emailTo.description: Base64-encoded email address. When sending an email, the `fromUserId` parameter is also required.

excludeHiddenEntities.description: If `true`, the exported file won't have any parts and assemblies marked as hidden

flatPatternAsync.description: If `true`, flat pattern export being called via async

fromUserId.description: Your user ID. Required when providing the `emailTo` parameter.

useYAxisAsUp.description: If `true`, the exported file will have all the parts and assemblies reoriented such that the Z-axis within Onshape becomes the Y-axis in the exported file.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

documentFilter.description: Type of documents to search: `0: My Documents | 1: Created | 2: Shared | 3: Trash | 4: Public | 5: Recent | 6: By Owner | 7: By Company | 9: By Team`

limit.description: Number of results to return per page. Default value is 20 (also the maximum).

offset.description: Offset. Determines where search results begin. Default value is 0.

ownerId.description: Owner ID. Can be a user ID, company ID, or team ID, depending on `ownerType`.

rawQuery.description: Search for documents that contain the given string in the name. Search is not case-sensitive.

sortColumn.description: Column by which to sort search results. `name | modifiedAt | createdAt (default) | email | modifiedBy | promotedAt`

sortOrder.description: Type of documents to search: `0: My Documents | 1: Created | 2: Shared | 3: Trash | 4: Public | 5: Recent | 6: By Owner | 7: By Company | 9: By Team`

type.description: Type of owner. `0: User | 1: Company | 2: Onshape`. If the owner is a teamId, leave this unspecified.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

isPublic.description: `true` to make the new document public.

ownerId.description: Owner of the new document. Can be a [user ID](#/User/sessionInfo) or [company ID](#/Company/findCompany), depending on `ownerTypeIndex`.

parentId.description: Optionally add the new document to the specified folder. Provide the folder ID as the parent ID.

projectId.description: Optionally add the new document to the specified project.

repointAppElementVersionRefs.description: `true` to re-point version references in application elements to the initial version in the new document.

BTCopyDocumentParams.description: Options for the new copied document.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

libraryDefinitionId.description: The ID of the definition of the element library.

libraryId.description: The Id of the library -- unique across Onshape.

libraryVersion.description: The current version Id of the library.

ownerId.description: The owner Id of an element library (either Onshape, company, or user).

ownerType.description: The type of library owner, Onshape, user, or company

sourceFolderId.description: The id of the root folder of the library

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

groups.description: List of folders or elements in this group (folder).

nodeId.description: A unique identifier for this folder.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

BTInsertableInfo.description: Array of items in the current page.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

description.description: The label that will appear in the document's edit history for this operation. If blank, a value will be auto-generated.

formatId.description: The data type of the application. This string allows an application to distinguish their elements from elements of another application.

jsonTree.description: Initialization data for the new element's json tree.

name.description: The name of the element being created. If blank, a name will be auto-generated.

subelements.description: Initialization data for the new element's subelements.

approvers.description: The users who approved the release package that created this revision.

canChangeType.description: Whether the revision can change object type. Used in reuse part number flow.

companyId.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

description.description: The Revision Description metadata property if revision is of a drawing.

documentId.description: The document that contains the revision object.

documentName.description: The name of the document that contains the revision object.

documentState.description: The state of document containing this revision. Used in reuse part number flow

elementId.description: The element that contains the revision object.

elementType.description: The type of item Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

isObsolete.description: Whether the revision has been obsoleted.

isRereleasable.description: If true, the revision can be created again.

nextRevisionId.description: The next revision if applicable. null for the latest revision.

obsoletionPackageId.description: The OBSOLETION release package that obsoleted this revision if applicable.

partNumber.description: The part number with which the object was revised.

previousRevisionId.description: The previous revision if applicable. null for first revision.

releaseId.description: The release package that created this revision.

releaseName.description: The name of the release package that created this item.

versionId.description: The version of the document that contains this revision.

versionName.description: The name of the version of the document that contains this revision.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

BTGroupOrElementReference-2205.description: List of folders or elements in this group (folder).

value.description: The unit that should be used.

BTDefaultUnitInfo.description: Specifies which unit should be used for each supported quantity type.

elementId.description: The id of an element which provides context for the position value specified.

position.description: An indicator for the relative placement of the new element. If elementId is specified, a negative number indicates insertion prior to the element and a non-negative number indicates insertion following the element. If no elementId is specified, a negative value indicates insertion at the end of the element list and a non-negative number indicates insertion at the start of the element list.

BTElementLocationParams.description: The location at which the new element should be inserted.

baseContent.description: This base64-encoded data is treated as a full representation of the sub-element's data and all deltas previously added will no longer be returned.

delta.description: This base64-encoded data is a delta which the application can apply to the last added baseContent data.

subelementId.description: The id of the subelement to edit. The value is determined by the application.

id.description: User ID of the user who approved the revision.

name.description: Name of the user who approved the revision.

BTRevisionApproverInfo.description: The users who approved the release package that created this revision.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

scopes.OAuth2ReadPII: Application can read your profile information
scopes.OAuth2Write: Application can write to your documents
scopes.OAuth2Delete: Application can delete your documents and workspaces
scopes.OAuth2Purchase: Application can request purchases on your behalf
scopes.OAuth2Share: Application can share and unshare documents on your behalf
scopes.document.create: Atlas Application can create a document
scopes.document.edit: Atlas Application can edit a document
scopes.document.delete: Atlas Application can delete a document
scopes.document.read: Atlas Application can read a document
scopes.enterprise.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.read: Atlas Application can read from an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.edit: Atlas Application can edit an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.delete: Atlas Application can delete an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.member.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.read: Atlas Application can read the details of an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.edit: Atlas Application can edit the details of an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.delete: Atlas Application can delete a member from an enterprise
scopes.webhook.create: Atlas Application can create a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.edit: Atlas Application can edit a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.read: Atlas Application can read a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.delete: Atlas Application can delete a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.PLMIntegration: PLM automation can invoke limited operations

BasicAuth.description: Use Basic Authentication with API Keys (key as username and secret as password) to authenticate requests.
